disclosure.ai_voice_notice: Public voices listed here are AI voice models or AI-training voice sources. Generated audio must be disclosed as AI-generated or AI-assisted speech.
disclosure.no_bundled_weights: This repository stores metadata, source links, and license notes only. Model weights, datasets, and generated voice files are not bundled.
disclosure.privacy_boundary: Private user voices and public AI voices must remain clearly separated in manifests and generated output metadata.

voices.label: Meta MMS-TTS Korean
voices.quality_note: Korean VITS checkpoint from Meta MMS. The model card notes that Korean input must be romanized with uroman before inference.
voices.ai_voice_disclosure: AI-generated Korean voice synthesized with Meta MMS-TTS Korean.
voices.attribution: Meta AI, Massively Multilingual Speech (MMS): Korean Text-to-Speech, facebook/mms-tts-kor.
voices.citation: Vineel Pratap et al., Scaling Speech Technology to 1,000+ Languages, arXiv:2305.13516, 2023.

voices.label: Piper ONNX KSS Korean
voices.quality_note: Local Piper-compatible ONNX Korean TTS model trained from the KSS dataset.
voices.ai_voice_disclosure: AI-generated Korean voice synthesized with a Piper model trained on the public KSS Korean speech dataset.
voices.citation: Kyubyong Park, KSS Dataset: Korean Single Speaker Speech Dataset, 2018.

voices.label: Coqui VITS KSS Korean
voices.quality_note: Coqui VITS Korean TTS model trained from the KSS dataset.
voices.ai_voice_disclosure: AI-generated Korean voice synthesized with a Coqui VITS model trained on the public KSS Korean speech dataset.
voices.citation: Kyubyong Park, KSS Dataset: Korean Single Speaker Speech Dataset, 2018.

voices.label: KSS Korean Single Speaker Speech Dataset
voices.quality_note: Korean single-speaker speech dataset with 12+ hours of 44.1kHz WAV and aligned text. This is a public training source, not a bundled KVAE voice.
voices.ai_voice_disclosure: Any model trained from KSS must be disclosed as an AI voice trained from the public KSS Korean speech dataset.
voices.attribution: Kyubyong Park, KSS Dataset: Korean Single Speaker Speech Dataset.
voices.citation: Kyubyong Park, KSS Dataset: Korean Single Speaker Speech Dataset, https://kaggle.com/bryanpark/korean-single-speaker-speech-dataset, 2018.

voices.label: TensorSpeech FastSpeech2 KSS Korean
voices.license: Apache-2.0 model card; upstream KSS dataset is non-commercial/share-alike
voices.quality_note: FastSpeech2 Korean model trained on KSS. KVAE treats it as non-commercial by default because of the upstream dataset license.
voices.ai_voice_disclosure: AI-generated Korean voice synthesized with a FastSpeech2 model trained on KSS.
voices.attribution: TensorSpeech tts-fastspeech2-kss-ko; upstream KSS Korean speech dataset.
voices.citation: Yi Ren et al., FastSpeech 2; TensorSpeech TensorFlowTTS; Kyubyong Park KSS Dataset.

voices.label: Full-Tuned Tacotron MinSeok
voices.quality_note: Korean Tacotron model. KVAE keeps this as an experimental entry until training data provenance is reviewed.
voices.ai_voice_disclosure: AI-generated Korean voice synthesized with a public Korean Tacotron model.
voices.attribution: Shin MinSeok, Korean Tacotron Text-to-Speech with Reinforcement Learning, Hugging Face Hub.
voices.citation: Shin MinSeok, Korean Tacotron Text-to-Speech with Reinforcement Learning, 2024.
